summary: Cross-WIN framing asymmetry between WIN-058 (commit-pinned) and WIN-058b/WIN-062 (loose date) addressed by PATCH-303-B (WIN-062 leg) and PATCH-303-C (WIN-058b leg). All three WINs now reference commit 6e06efb (2026-04-17) consistently, with the enumeration normalized to "three" (no hedge).
